SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut.backbone.embedded

Class EmbeddedBackbone

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.backbone.embedded.EmbeddedBackbone
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBackbone, EventListener, org.springframework.context.ApplicationListener<TopicEvent>
@Service @ConditionalOnProperty(value="supernaut.backbone.storage", havingValue="embedded", matchIfMissing=true) public class EmbeddedBackbone extends Object implements IBackbone, org.springframework.context.ApplicationListener<TopicEvent>
